item_text: user -> admin — type=association; label="login"; explanation="user logs in to admin system"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: user successfully logs into the admin system module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: user123 - password: pass123 test steps: 1. user enters "user123" as the username. 2. user enters "pass123" as the password. 3. user clicks on the login button. 4. system verifies the credentials. 5. system displays a success message. expected result: user is logged into the admin system.

item_text: user -> product — type=association; label="add"; explanation="user adds a product to their cart"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-additemtocart-001 title: user successfully adds an item to their cart module: add item to cart source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - item name: "mouse" - item price: 29.99 test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user clicks on the "add item" button. 3. user selects "mouse" as the item name. 4. user enters "29.99" as the item price. 5. user clicks on the "add" button. 6. system adds the item to the cart. 7. system displays a success message. expected result: item is added to the user's cart.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-addproduct-001 title: admin successfully adds a product to the system module: add product source pages: 1 preconditions: admin is logged in. test data: - product name: "laptop" - product description: "high-performance laptop with 16gb ram" test steps: 1. admin logs in. 2. admin clicks on the "add product" button. 3. admin enters "laptop" as the product name. 4. admin enters "high-performance laptop with 16gb ram" as the product description. 5. admin clicks on the "save" button. 6. system saves the product. 7. system displays a success message. expected result: product is added to the system.

item_text: the diagram models a simple e-commerce system where users can log in, add products to their cart, and remove items from their cart.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-additemtocart-001 title: user successfully adds an item to their cart module: add item to cart source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - item name: "mouse" - item price: 29.99 test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user clicks on the "add item" button. 3. user selects "mouse" as the item name. 4. user enters "29.99" as the item price. 5. user clicks on the "add" button. 6. system adds the item to the cart. 7. system displays a success message. expected result: item is added to the user's cart.

item_text: the main flows show the interactions between the user and the admin system, including login, adding products to the cart, and removing items from the cart.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-cartoperations-001 title: admin successfully adds an item to their cart module: admin cart operations source pages: 1 preconditions: admin is logged in. test data: - item name: "headphones" - item price: 49.99 test steps: 1. admin logs in. 2. admin clicks on the "add item" button. 3. admin selects "headphones" as the item name. 4. admin enters "49.99" as the item price. 5. admin clicks on the "add" button. 6. system adds the item to the admin's cart. 7. system displays a success message. expected result: item is added to the admin's cart.
